response: [{"question_number": 1, "question_text": "What is cloud computing?", "options": {"A": "Running applications on local servers", "B": "Delivery of computing services over the internet", "C": "A type of programming language", "D": "A hardware component"}, "correct_answer": "B", "explanation": "Cloud computing is the delivery of computing services over the internet.", "topic": "Cloud Concepts", "difficulty": "easy"}, {"question_number": 2, "question_text": "Which cloud model provides the most control over hardware?", "options": {"A": "SaaS", "B": "PaaS", "C": "IaaS", "D": "FaaS"}, "correct_answer": "C", "explanation": "IaaS provides the most control as you manage the OS, middleware, and applications.", "topic": "Cloud Concepts", "difficulty": "easy"}, {"question_number": 3, "question_text": "What is an Azure region?", "options": {"A": "A pricing tier", "B": "A set of datacenters connected by a low-latency network", "C": "A type of virtual machine", "D": "A subscription level"}, "correct_answer": "B", "explanation": "An Azure region is a set of datacenters deployed within a latency-defined perimeter.", "topic": "Azure Architecture and Services", "difficulty": "easy"}]
